summary: Completed phases 1-6 of 15. Next: phase 7 (Eliminations.lean, 902 lines -- largest file). All 6 completed phases build with zero sorry, zero axioms.

artifacts.summary: Foundation types: IntStructure, int_truth, int_equiv, syntactic predicates, structural measures
Substitution, freshness (fresh_atom, fresh_atoms with Infinite typeclass), DNF/CNF
Integer arithmetic helpers: well-ordering, witness constructions
GHR94 Lemma 10.2.1: U/S distribute over boolean ops
GHR94 Lemma 10.2.2: negation equivalences for U and S over Z

continuation_context.notes: Phase 7 (Eliminations.lean) is the largest file at 902 lines with 8 elimination cases. KEY PORTING INSIGHT: scoped notation (F, G, H, P, S, U) is active in child namespaces of Cslib.Logic.Bimodal, so (1) avoid these as lambda variable names, (2) use rw with int_truth_neg/int_truth_or/int_truth_and to reduce goals rather than simp only [int_truth] which unfolds everything to raw implications, (3) use fully qualified Formula.neg/Formula.or/Formula.and in type signatures. The source uses int_truth_and_iff/int_truth_or_iff/int_truth_neg_iff which map to our int_truth_and/int_truth_or/int_truth_neg simp lemmas. The source also uses open Classical which should become open Classical in or section-scoped.
